title: Functional genomics of wood quality and properties.
author: Tang W Luo X Nelson A Collver H Kinken K
content: S-EPMC5172417 PMC5172417 Functional genomics of wood quality and properties. Genomics promises to enrich the investigations of biology and biochemistry. Current advancements in genomics have major implications for genetic improvement in animals, plants, and microorganisms, and for our understanding
